author: doll-agent
content: Document why the four Bool traits exist as separate types: Arrow's BooleanArray is bit-packed (not a PrimitiveArray<BooleanType>) and Polars uses BooleanChunked, neither of which slot into the ArrowPrimitiveType / PolarsNumericType machinery the main trait uses. Unifying would require a new abstraction over 'primitive vs. bit-packed' / 'numeric vs. boolean' — more API surface than the duplication saves. Add 'Why a separate trait? (#311)' sections to all four trait docstrings.
